expectations.text: Includes all 12 official brand colors as CSS variables
expectations.evidence: Only Snowflake Blue and Deep Blue from official palette. Many invented colors (#1A8CB8, #6ED0F0). Missing all 5 secondary colors and 4 tertiary colors.

expectations.text: First chart color is Snowflake Blue #29B5E8

expectations.evidence: Uses 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial — not Lato or any official Snowflake font
